meta.title: Interview with Kelly Jackson Higgins (plus pirates)
meta.description: We flipped the tables and recorded Kelly interviewing Dale Peterson in the S4x19 Green Room. There is some fun shots of the pirates (Bryan Owen, Billy Rios and Jonathan Butts + Eric Byres as the shark) getting ready to go on stage at S4x19 at the beginning as well.
